name: Blueberry Buttermilk Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the dry ingredients together in a large bowl.
2. In another bowl, whisk the eggs, buttermilk, and melted butter.
3. Make a well in the dry ingredients and pour in the liquid ingredients.
4. Mix quickly until combined.
5. Fold in the blueberries.
6. Spoon the batter into greased muffin cups.
7. Bake at 400°F for 20-30 minutes, or until golden brown.
8. Makes 24 muffins.
